models.model_label: Feature diagram (domain analysis model) for MASLUS (first step toward a DSML for agent-based models in Land Use Science)

evidence_quotes.quote: In this paper we will only focus on the first phase of the DSML development: the domain analysis. The objective of this phase is to produce a domain model that will support the implementation of the DSML.
Next step of our work will consist of designing and implementing the DSML.

goals.justification: The paper explicitly frames the domain model's purpose as supporting the implementation of the DSML, matching the For Intervening signal of a model intended to enable artifact/system development.

evidence_quotes.quote: We performed a domain analysis and contributed to MASLUS field by presenting a feature model that illustrates vocabulary and key concepts of the problem domain.
To identify which features are important for MASLUS, we first proceeded to the analysis of technical literature and identified MASLUS requirements.

goals.justification: The feature model is explicitly presented as illustrating the vocabulary and key concepts of the problem domain, directly matching the For Understanding signals of clarify, conceptualize, and shared understanding of a domain.

evidence_quotes.quote: While Multi-Agent Systems are widely used in Land Use Science, it still remains challenging for scientists to specify their models in a manner that they can be understood and used by others.

uncertain_goals.reason: The communication concern is framed as a general motivation for the future DSML rather than as a stated purpose of the domain analysis model itself, so the link to For Communicating is indirect.
